etapas.tutorial: Actuation failure: the electrical system does not detect the solenoid power supply (24 VDC).
Open the cover of the electrical connection compartment.
Using a multimeter, check the voltage at the terminals. The correct value is 24V.
Refasten the broken or loose wires. The electrical connection has been successfully restored.

tutorialInicial: Place the object on the surface to begin the problem solution.
popupInicialTexto1: Point your camera at a flat surface and wait for the white background to appear.
popupInicialTexto2: Once it appears, tap the screen to view the object.
